docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,969.00 FILED BY SAINEZ, JOHANNA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOLENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2014 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SAINEZ, JOHANNA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAINEZ, JOHANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOLENE $2,413.00 PRINCIPAL, $112.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,525.50, FROM THE SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $2,700.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $2,413.00, LEAVING A BALANCE OWED TO DEFENDANT OF $287.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00) SERVED FEB-15-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOLENE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
